summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MiLesson Plan MVP - all core features working correctly
passed_tests: Subscription plans endpoint (/api/subscription/plans) - returns plan data
Auth session endpoint (/api/auth/session) - proper structure validation
Auth protection - all protected endpoints require authentication
Lesson generation with AI - GPT-5.2 integration working
Lesson list retrieval - authenticated users can view lessons
Mocked subscription - demo payment flow working
Frontend login page - renders correctly with Google OAuth button
Google OAuth redirect - properly redirects to Emergent Auth
Dashboard authentication protection - redirects to login when not authenticated
Dashboard functionality - lesson form, syllabus selection, dropdowns working
Lesson generation UI - form validation, loading states, lesson display
MyHub page - lesson history, statistics, search/filter functionality
Subscribe page - pricing plans, features, mocked payment notice
